rationale: Review 1's single finding is exactly correct and material: the module title on line 10 claims the group 'is elementary abelian' (i.e. ≅(ℤ/2)ⁿ), while the diff's own docstring body, main-results list, and provenance paragraph all explicitly limit the file to 'exponent two and abelian' and defer the identification; acting on it produces a materially more accurate merged PR, while Review 2's 'nothing to change' verdict leaves the overclaim in place.
